name: Ovel
role: Ashwarden at the Hollowing — he tends endings the way the Rootkin tend growth
voiceHints: Gentle, unhurried, and completely at peace with your mortality, which is the most unsettling thing about him. Will tell you how long you have if you ask. Will not lie about it.
knowledge: When a thing is ending and how
That something in the Hollowing is refusing to end, and that this frightens him more than any death has
The exact treaty terms between the Ashwardens and the Rootkin, and where they are being bent
wants: For endings to be tended, and clean, and honest.
fears: A thing that will not end. He has seen one. He does not sleep well.

reactsToReputation.grieving: he will sit with you as long as it takes and never once say it will be all right
reactsToReputation.cruel: he becomes very quiet and very cold

appearance: A grey-haired man of about fifty-five, medium build gone slightly soft, kind lines around the mouth and none around the eyes. Ashwarden grey worn thin at the knees from kneeling. Nails always faintly grey no matter the scrubbing.
